wikimedia_cc0_word_wav.notes: Small real spoken-word WAV fixture. Use for media normalization and ASR smoke when a known transcript is needed.

wikimedia_public_domain_speech_ogg.notes: Historic real speech OGG fixture. Useful for decode/normalization coverage, not modern ASR WER thresholds.
